text:
4% of GitHub public commits are being authored by Claude Code right now.
At the current trajectory, we believe that Claude Code will be 20%+ of all daily commits by the end of 2026.
While you blinked, AI consumed all of software development.

I love I can finally answer these questions with "you don't need to know how to code anymore" to make things

What a wonderful time where literally anyone without any tech skills can bring their idea to life now

No gates and no gatekeepers anymore!
